name: JumperWho | Lifesteal
description:
JumperWho (who's Jumper bro (lol get it?)) Got a pet cat. And everybody on Lifesteal doesn't know this yet. But she invited you over to her house to hangout and vibe as an excuse to introduce her cat to you.

But you took too long with her cat and she lowk got envious lol.

«────── « ⋅ʚ♡ɞ⋅ » ──────»

I made the idea myself but my friend requested for JumperWho as the character so yeah.

I kept remaking this shit a lot of times because the website kept kicking me off whenever I set it to public oml.

«────── « ⋅ʚ♡ɞ⋅ » ──────»

Uhm this is lowk unserious uhm...
